tasks.title: Gap #18: Phonological geometry through connector
tasks.definition_of_done: Cosine similarity of voicing vector before/after connector measured
tasks.result: Voicing vectors peak at layer 5 (cos_sim=0.155). Stop-stop weak alignment (+0.25), stop-fricative orthogonal. Partial support for linear phonological structure in Whisper-base.

tasks.title: IIT experiment: Triple Convergence Causal Test
tasks.definition_of_done: Layer-wise causal contribution plot produced
tasks.result: Layer-wise causal ablation: all layers critical (WER=1.0 on any ablation). No redundant layers. Early layers (0-3) as important as late layers (4-5). Confirms distributed encoding in Whisper-base.

tasks.title: Listen Layer Paper: ALME conflict patching on Qwen2-Audio
